2.2.2-r1.name: medaka
2.2.2-r1.license: Oxford Nanopore Technologies PLC. Public License Version 1.0

meta.summary: Medaka 2.2.2 CPU-oriented runtime for Oxford Nanopore consensus polishing and haploid variant calling, with bundled models, pyabpoa, and required alignment/HTS helper binaries.
meta.description: Medaka 2.2.2 CPU-oriented runtime for Oxford Nanopore consensus polishing and haploid variant calling, with bundled models, pyabpoa, and required alignment/HTS helper binaries.

test: test "$(python -c 'import medaka; print(medaka.__version__)')" = '2.2.2' && medaka --version 2>&1 | grep -F '2.2.2' >/dev/null && python -c 'import medaka, torch, pysam, mappy, spoa, parasail, pyabpoa; print(medaka.__version__)' | grep -Fx '2.2.2' >/dev/null

medaka --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: medaka' >/dev/null && medaka tools list_models 2>&1 | grep -F 'Available:' >/dev/null && medaka_consensus -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Assembly polishing via neural networks' >/dev/null && medaka_variant -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Haploid variant calling via neural networks' >/dev/null && medaka_consensus_joint -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Assembly polishing via neural networks' >/dev/null

medaka_version_report >/tmp/taf-medaka-version-report.txt 2>&1 && rm -f /tmp/taf-medaka-version-report.txt && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools' >/dev/null && minimap2 --version 2>&1 | grep -E '^[0-9]' >/dev/null && bcftools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bcftools' >/dev/null && bgzip --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version:' >/dev/null && tabix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version:' >/dev/null
data=$(medaka_data_path); test -d "$data" && find "$data" -name '*_model_pt.tar.gz' | grep -F '_model_pt.tar.gz' >/dev/null && medaka tools list_models 2>&1 | grep -F 'Default consensus:' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-medaka-mini-align-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>draft
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > "$tmp/draft.fa"; printf '>read1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>read2
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > "$tmp/reads.fa"; mini_align -i "$tmp/reads.fa" -r "$tmp/draft.fa" -p "$tmp/calls_to_draft" -t 1 >/tmp/taf-medaka-mini-align.log 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/calls_to_draft.bam"; samtools quickcheck "$tmp/calls_to_draft.bam"; test -s "$tmp/calls_to_draft.bam.bai"; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-medaka-mini-align.log

upstream.name: medaka
upstream.license: Oxford Nanopore Technologies PLC. Public License Version 1.0
upstream.citation: Oxford Nanopore Technologies. medaka: Sequence correction provided by ONT Research.
